task.title: PostgreSQL Database Setup
task.description: Deploy CloudNative-PG operator and PostgreSQL cluster for structured data storage

implementation.details:
1. Install CloudNative-PG operator
2. Create PostgreSQL cluster with 1 instance
3. Configure database schemas for users, tenants, notifications
4. Set up connection pooling
5. Create service accounts and secrets

task.acceptance_criteria: PostgreSQL cluster is running, accepts connections, alerthub database exists, connection string works from test pod
